title: Pixalette
description: A vibrant, pixel art resource pack for Minecraft.
body:
Join my  [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/YdSN9gMk9u)  for news on upcoming updates!  
  
Or, follow me on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/pixelstoriez)!  
  
Pixalette is a cartoony 16x resource pack with rich, vibrant colors and simplistic textures that I've been working on in my freetime for the past few years.  
  
If you'd like to support me, you can donate to my [Ko-fi﻿](https://ko-fi.com/pixelstories). Any amount helps me out a ton!

![A scenic view of a spruce village in Minecraft using Pixalette](https://i.imgur.com/vyYLkQL.png)
![An in-game screenshot in Minecraft survival mode using Pixalette](https://i.imgur.com/0r1K4SP.png)

Many textures in this pack utilise Dawnbringer 32, a palette which was created by Richard "DawnBringer" Fhager. You can find the original artist and palette [here﻿](https://pixeljoint.com/forum/forum_posts.asp?TID=12795).
